interaction_phrase: Reports about training enrollment, progress and completion is reported to the Partner
occurrence_sentence: Employees of IBM Business Partners: Reports about training enrollment, progress and completion is reported to the Partner Plus Ecosystem in relation to compliance with the initiative requirements for programs such as Partner Plus Proficiency Groups and Partner Plus Ecosystem metrics.

interaction_phrase: Results and course completion are shared with IBM's skills and training applications,
occurrence_sentence: Employees of IBM Business Partners: Results and course completion are shared with IBM's skills and training applications, which may be used for IBM's skill tooling and programs. For IBM education programs, course completion is shared with your manager and your direct management may request progress reports about your Digital Learning enrollments and progress from IBM Training and Skills.

interaction_phrase: The support materials included with these IBM training materials, which include videos,
occurrence_sentence: As part of the Partner Plus Proficiency Program, a business partner certifies that completion of IBM training materials, including proficiency badges and IBM certifications are to be used solely to advance their own individual knowledge, or to assist their IBM Business Partner company with their proficiency requirements. The support materials included with these IBM training materials, which include videos, presentations, demonstrations, and quiz and test questions, cannot be shared outside of the above intended purposes without the express permission of IBM, including sharing the above materials (including quiz answers) with individuals in the business partner's organization.
